---
title: "EDM_analysis"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Package and data

```{r}
if (!dir.exists("../output")) {
  dir.create("../output")
}

invisible(lapply(c("tidyverse", "lubridate", "rEDM", "purrr"),require,character.only = TRUE))

positionnement_palette <- c("A" = "#385438", "B" = "#609060", "C" = "#a8c090")
season_palette <- c('autumn' = '#CA7842', "summer" = "#DDA853", 'winter' = '#8ACCD5', "spring" = "#A4B465" )


data_edm <- read.csv("../data/SEM_database.csv", sep = ",", na.strings = c("", "NA"))
data_edm$date <- ymd_hms(data_edm$date, tz = "UTC")

data_edm <- data_edm %>% 
  dplyr::select(date, positionnement, profondeur, orientation, season, hum, temp, all_taxa, root)

data_edm <- data_edm %>%  
  rename("root" = root,
         "fauna" = all_taxa)
```
